audit_items.proof_trace: `set_create_callback()` returns `void` — there is no return value to NULL-check, making the property assertion vacuously false. The stored `_create_callback` field is the only NPD-relevant concern, and it is guarded at its single call site in `async_accept()` (line 167: `if (_create_callback) _create_callback(stream);`) before invocation. All three callback fields (`_create_callback`, `_accept_callback`, `_accept_fail_callback`) are null-checked before use.
